rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>Yes, Sasan! Why are you bringing him up?
Do you have news?!

<unk[3:0:263]>Oh... <unk[5:0]>I guess it's because I mentioned
him, huh? 

<unk[3:0:257]>Sasan is my best friend and favorite
person.<unk[5:0]> He's Hylian and a traveling
merchant. Pretty neat, right?
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>We made a promise that, no matter what
transpired, we would always meet up here
in Zora's Domain on a certain day.
<unk[3:0:259]>Sasan always keeps his promises.
However, this time...

That day has already come and gone,
and still no sight of him.

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]><Size=80>He still hasn't arrived...<Size=100>


<unk[3:0:266]>That's why I decided to write him a letter.
<unk[5:0]>After all, I must do something!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>没错！<unk[5:0]>是我的好朋友！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:259]>我的爸爸妈妈都很忙，<unk[5:0]>
我经常自己一个人玩……
<unk[3:0:261]>有一次，我写了一封信放进了漂流瓶里，<unk[5:0]>
希望有人能够借此找到我。
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>结果，<unk[5:0]>没想到真的有回信……！<unk[5:0]>
给我回信的那个人就是萨撒诺！
<unk[3:0:264]>自那以后，每到我们约好的日子，
他就一定会来领地里玩！
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>但是这次，约定的日子已经过了，
萨撒诺还是没有来……
我很担心，想出去找他……<unk[5:0]>
可是外面到处都是淤泥，<unk[5:0]>妈妈还说太危险了……
<unk[3:0:259]>所以我在想，是不是该给他写封信……

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>沒錯，<unk[5:0]>我們很要好！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>結果令我大吃一驚！<unk[5:0]>真的有人回信了……！<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>That's right.<unk[5:0]> Sasan is important to me.<unk[5:0]>
He's my best friend and favorite person!

<unk[3:0:259]>I was kind of a loner before I met him.<unk[5:0]>
My family and friends stay pretty busy.

<unk[3:0:261]>That's why I sent a letter drifting down
the river.<unk[5:0]> I wanted to connect with
someone.
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>The rest, as they say, is history. <unk[5:0]>I got a 
response, <unk[5:0]>and it was from Sasan!

<unk[3:0:264]>Ever since, he's always kept the promise
we made to meet up in the domain on a
certain day, no matter what transpired.
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>However, this time is different. The
promised day has come and gone, and
Sasan never appeared.
I'm so worried.<unk[5:0]> I want to go and search
for him, but...<unk[5:0]>with the sludge, I know it
would worry my mother sick if I left.
<unk[3:0:259]>She asked me to try writing a letter
instead. I hate that it's so reasonable,
I had to comply.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>Urgh... I'm having so much trouble
writing this.

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Sasan, how wonderful it would be<unk[5:0]> if you
could stay here in the domain forever.

<unk[3:0:259]>Then again, if you did that, I wouldn't be
able to hear your stories about your
adventures and the other places you visit.

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Haha, <unk[5:0]>that's true.


<unk[3:0:264]>It would be amazing if we could go on an
adventure together one day, Finley!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>利特村那里有一片湖，就在令人目眩的山崖下，<unk[5:0]>
我闭着眼睛跳进去过哦～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>有座湖泊在利特村那令人眼花的懸崖下面，<unk[5:0]>
我閉上雙眼跳進去過喔～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村には <Ruby={2:2}め>目がくらむ<Ruby={2:4}がけ>崖の<Ruby={2:4}した>下に <Ruby={2:8}みずうみ>湖があるから<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}め>目を<Ruby={2:4}つぶ>瞑って <Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込んでみたよ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>I found a lake under this dizzyingly high
cliff in Rito Village, <unk[5:0]>and so I tried closing
my eyes and jumping in.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>ゴロン<Ruby={4:8}おんせん>温泉で ゆで<Ruby={2:6}たまご>卵ができるまで
<Ruby={2:4}ぼく>僕も <Ruby={2:4}あつ>熱さに<Ruby={2:2}た>耐えてみたよ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>I tried my best to withstand the heat in
the Goron Hot Springs,<unk[5:0]> until it got so hot,
I could practically boil an egg in there!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>格鲁德小镇那里刮着很强力的沙尘，<unk[5:0]>
当时可遭了不少罪呢～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>ゲルドの<Ruby={2:4}まち>街では すごい<Ruby={4:6}さじん>砂塵が<Ruby={2:2}ふ>吹いてて<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いっきり <Ruby={2:2}も>揉まれてきたよ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>There was an incredible sand shroud
blowing around in Gerudo Town.<unk[5:0]>
It really roughed me up!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>来卓拉领地的路上，我一直走在淤泥地里，<unk[5:0]><unk[5:0]>
还跨越了重重岩石呢～
毕竟我和菲内约好了，
要锻炼出强壮的肌肉嘛。
<Size=80><unk[3:0:259]>虽然没能游过河流就是了……<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>在前往卓拉領地的路上，我除了走在淤泥中，<unk[5:0]><unk[5:0]>
還跨越了許多岩石才能抵達～
因為我已經跟菲內說好，
要成為肌肉猛男呢。
<Size=80><unk[3:0:259]>雖然我沒辦法游過河川就是了……<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:4}さと>里までは ヘドロの<Ruby={2:4}なか>中を<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩いたり<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}いわ>岩を <Ruby={2:2}の>乗り<Ruby={2:2}こ>越えたりして<Ruby={2:2}き>来たよ～
<Ruby={4:8}きんにく>筋肉モリモリになるって
フィネさんと <Ruby={4:8}やくそく>約束したから
<Size=80><unk[3:0:259]><Ruby={2:4}かわ>川を<Ruby={2:4}およ>泳いでは<Ruby={2:2}こ>来られなかったけど…<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>I walked through the sludge and climbed
over stones...<unk[5:0]><unk[5:0]> I did whatever I had to so
that I could make it to Zora's Domain.
After all, I promised you that I would swim
and climb and lift and do all sorts of
things to try to build up my muscles.
<Size=80><unk[3:0:259]>I couldn't swim the rivers though...<Size=100>

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76]>ササノ<Ruby={2:4}くん>君 すごい！<unk[5:0]>
もっと<Ruby={4:8}ぼうけん>冒険のお<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話を <Ruby={2:2}き>聞かせてほしいです！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76]>Sasan, that's amazing!<unk[5:0]> Please, tell me all
about your adventures!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>快乐的闲谈时光总是过得很快呢，
一转眼就已经到晚上了……
晚安……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>お<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話するのが<Ruby={2:4}たの>楽しいと <Ruby={2:4}とき>時の<Ruby={2:2}た>経つのが<Ruby={2:4}はや>速すぎて
すぐ<Ruby={2:4}よる>夜になっちゃいます…
おやすみなさい…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>Time sure flies when you're enjoying
great conversation. Before I knew it,
the sun had set.
Good night!
